sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n15856" key="a)rxe/bakxos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχέβακχος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n15856.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">leader of</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Βάκχοι,</foreign> title of Dionysus, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Wiener Denkschr..</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2034.tlg003:44(16).104" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">44(16).104</biblScope> </bibl> (Seleucia ad Calycadnum).</sense> </entryFree>
